title: xanthosia pannosa
intro: Xanthosia pannosa, also known as parsley fern, is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family Apiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Xanthosia pannosa include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. Xanthosia pannosa is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it can also be used in herbal infusions and salves.
